# Post Fiat

> The first AI Hive Mind cryptocurrency — coordinating value through AI instead of centralized institutions.

## What is Post Fiat?

Post Fiat is a cryptocurrency and coordination network that uses AI to reach qualitative agreement without centralization. It evolves from a personal and group financial structure to a societal governance primitive.

## Key Links

- Website: https://postfiat.org
- Whitepaper: https://postfiat.org/whitepaper/
- Task Node (earn tokens): https://tasknode.postfiat.org
- Discord Community: https://discord.gg/U6HjgDSmhR
- Validator Setup: https://www.jollydinger.com/pftvalidatorsetup/setup/
- GitHub: https://github.com/postfiatorg
- Twitter: https://twitter.com/postfiatorg

## Core Thesis

1. **Governments have failed.** COVID vaccines, endless wars, declining standards of living combined with record spending and record low accountability spell the need for new governance systems.
2. **Crypto is inadequate.** Digital Scarcity or "Code is Law" are not viable alternatives to advanced social systems. Institutional blockchains are uninteresting when institutions are failing.
3. **AI is the solution.** AI provides a framework to reach qualitative agreement without centralization and to co-ordinate value.

## Documentation

- Full documentation: https://docs.postfiat.org
